zh.lifeSummary: Stephen Bachiler於1561年6月23日出生在英國。他於1590年之前與Ann在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓且於1644年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯特拉利 班可。他於1587年在英國哈普爾惠維爾被列為vicar of holy cross and st. peter。他去世於1656年10月31日之前在英國倫敦，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可倫敦 哥吉拉 哈洛福斯 斯泰寧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Stephen Bachiler于1561年6月23日出生在英国。他于1590年之前与Ann在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓且于1644年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯特拉利 班可。他于1587年在英国哈普爾惠維爾被列为vicar of holy cross and st. peter。他去世于1656年10月31日之前在英国倫敦，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可倫敦 哥吉拉 哈洛福斯 斯泰寧。

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

Historical Boundaries: 1636:  Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1716:  York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1764: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Stephen Bachiler was born on 23 June 1561, in England. He married Ann before 1590, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1639 and Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1644. In 1587, his occupation is listed as vicar of holy cross and st. peter in Wherwell, Hampshire, England. He died before 31 October 1656, in London, England, and was buried in London All Hallows Staining, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Bachilerは1561年6月23日にイギリスで生まれた。1590年以前にイギリスでAnnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトンに，1644年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーストラウバーイ バンクに住んでいた。1587年，イギリスハンプシュアイアウアーウエルでの職業はvicar of holy cross and st. peterと記録されている。彼は1656年10月31日以前にイギリスロンドンで死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン アル ハロウズ スティイニングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Bachiler(은)는 1561년 6월 23일 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1590년 이전 영국에서 Ann(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴에서, 1644년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스트롤베리 뱅크에서 살았다. 1587년, 그의 직업은 영국 함프실르 화웰에서 vicar of holy cross and st. peter이었다. 그는 1656년 10월 31일 이전 영국 런던에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 런던 앨 핼로스 스테인잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Stephen Bachiler nasceu em 23 de junho de 1561, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Ann antes 1590, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1639 e em Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1644. Em 1587, sua profissão aparece como vicar of holy cross and st. peter em Wherwell, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 31 de outubro de 1656, em London, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em London All Hallows Staining, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Stephen Bachiler родился 23 июня 1561 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann перед 1590 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году и в местности стравбири банк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1644 году. В 1587 году он работал по профессии vicar of holy cross and st. peter в местности уирвелл, хампшир, Англия. Он умер перед 31 октябрь 1656 г. в местности Лондон, Англия и был похоронен в местности лондон алл холлоус стеининг, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.
